offer: For property managers processing 10-20 maintenance requests/week, delayed updates cause tenant dissatisfaction. We provide weekly status updates instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem: Lack of timely updates on maintenance requests leads to tenant dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and weekly status updates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
